calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Default Judgment; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Amy E. Hammond, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) USED APPLIANCES EL PARIENTE, dba EL PARIENTE APPLIANCES; JESUS OROZCO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,714.18
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,068.94
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $768.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,551.12
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
